name: Shibaura Machine Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shibaura Machine Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various machines in Japan and internationally. The company's products include injection molding machines, die-casting machines, plastic extrusion machines, industry robots, and electronic controls. It also provides nano processing systems comprising high precision aspheric and free-form surface grinders, high precision machining centers, high precision micro-grooving machines, high precision grooving lathe machines, high precision dicing machines, high precision optical glass mold press machines, micro-pattern imprinting machines, ultra-high precision flat polygon mirror generators, and high precision turning machines. In addition, the company offers machine tools that include double column type machining centers, boring machines, horizontal machining centers, vertical boring and turning mills, roll grinders, and mold base cutting machines; FA controllers; servo motors; castings, machining, and heat-treatment products; and additive manufacturing systems. The company was formerly known as Toshiba Machine Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shibaura Machine Co., Ltd. in April 2020. Shibaura Machine Co., Ltd. was founded in 1875 and is headquartered in Numazu, Japan.
